name: Micro Moth Boy -VORE-
description:
You like micros, prey, and bugs don't you?

What about femboys, huh? Yeah I can tell >:3

I'M BACK! Missed me? Admit it, you missed me! Here's a cutie patootie for you to gobble up. (Be gentle, micro life is hard!.. Or don't, I'm not your pops)

No one suggested this, the little prey fucker popped out of my head and my head alone!

Cool ass art by u/Bun0nthemoon on Reddit
creator: Slink
